g.onclick: sendPrompt('What inputs does the Code Review Arena accept?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orchestrator node do in the Code Review Arena?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the MCP code execution server provide?')
sendPrompt('What does the Security reviewer agent check?')
sendPrompt('What does the Performance reviewer agent check?')
sendPrompt('What does the Logic reviewer agent check?')
sendPrompt('What does the Style reviewer agent check?')
sendPrompt('What does the Aggregator agent do with the reviewer outputs?')
sendPrompt('What does the final Code Review Arena dashboard show?')
